subcodes.first_line: The father must always endeavour to educate his son and to acquaint him with the heavenly teachings. He must give him advice
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پدر و پسر روحانی پدر باید همواره بتربیت پسر کوشد و تعلیم تعالیم آسمانی دهد
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @parents and children; youth; families, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
